creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 211946
svn diff for dns/dnscheckengine

dns/dnscheckengine is currently marked BROKEN as
the MASTER_SITES link vanished. The attached svn(1) diff(1)
replaces that link with a new reliable link.

CHANGES

Makefile
removes BROKEN
changes MASTER_SITES

distinfo
adds TIMESTAMP

That's it!

Tested on: FreeBSD 14.0-FUTURE cray256

Thanks!

--Chris
